chunks.text: Accounting & Financial Services Staff - EECS at Berkeley. Accounting & Financial Services Staff. Financial Services Contacts: accounting@eecs.berkeley.edu. Purchasing, reimbursements, fund balances, card management, recharge/billing. Research Contracts & Grants. Accounts and Purchasing. General Accounting Requests: accounting@eecs.berkeley.edu.
chunks.question: What is the email for general accounting requests?

chunks.text: Senior Financial Services Manager: Gabe Chang. Location: 375 Soda. Contact: +1 (510) 642-1390, gabe@eecs.berkeley.edu. Role: Accounting staff supervisor. Lead resource for all campus financial systems including BearBuy, T&E, BFS, etc. Oversees cash and procurement card management, and XRG accounting activities.
chunks.question: Who is the senior financial services manager?

chunks.text: Financial Services Managers: Caitlin Dey-Ward. Location: 313 Soda. Contact: +1 (510) 643-5383, caitlin@eecs.berkeley.edu. Role: Manages department operational funds including accounting activities for the Space Planning Group, ESG, and various administrative groups. Oversees all IRIS computing account setup/recharge billing and financial/accounting needs for IRIS, including ISG.
chunks.question: What does Caitlin Dey-Ward manage?

chunks.text: Financial Services Managers: Rebecca Davis. Location: 379 Soda. Contact: beckydavis@eecs.berkeley.edu. Role: Manages EECS faculty funds including start-up, retention, endowed chairs, FSS grants, and BEAR grants. Primary contact for faculty relocations, summer salary, recruitment allowance, and start-up graduate student support pledges.
chunks.question: What types of funds does Rebecca Davis manage?

chunks.text: Purchasing / Expense Processing Assistant: Colin Davis. Location: 375 Soda Hall. Contact: colinm@eecs.berkeley.edu. Role: General accounting assistance for purchasing and reimbursements using EECS-administered funds.
chunks.question: What is Colin Davis's role?

chunks.text: Purchasing / Expense Processing Assistant: Jamie Castrellon. Location: 315 Soda Hall. Contact: +1 (510) 644-5110, jamiecastrellon@eecs.berkeley.edu. Role: General accounting assistance for purchasing and reimbursements using EECS-administered funds.
chunks.question: Who assists with purchasing and reimbursements?
